title: Microsoft Just Shocked The Entire AI World: 7 New AI Models
summary: Microsoft announced seven in-house AI models including MAI-Thinking-1, Scout, Codename MDASH, and Majorana 2. The announcement positions Microsoft as building a full-stack AI solution while maintaining its partnership with OpenAI, creating a dual-threat competitive dynamic in the AI market.
